text: Financial performance indicates strong momentum through Q3 2025, with revenue reaching $10.42 billion in Q3 2025, representing 0.91% year-over-year growth from the Q3 2024 base of $9.72 billion. Net income demonstrated more robust expansion, growing to $2.90 billion in Q3 2025 from $2.51 billion in Q3 2024, with quarterly net income showing sequential improvement from $2.58 billion in Q1 2025 to $2.89 billion in Q2 2025 before reaching $2.90 billion in Q3 2025. The company's net margin stood at 27.86% in Q3 2025, suggesting strong profitability metrics. According to market commentary, American Express delivered record-breaking Q3 results and lifted full-year guidance on strong business momentum.
